# mdJSONdictio

Tools to Extract, Build, Modify, and Validate mdEditor Dictionary
records in R.

## Installation

You can install the released version of mdJSONdictio from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

    # Install devtools from CRAN
    install.packages("devtools")

    # Install mdJSONdictio from GitHub
    devtools::install_github("hdvincelette/mdJSONdictio", ref = 'v0.2.4')

And the development version of mdJSONdictio from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

    # Install devtools from CRAN
    install.packages("devtools")

    # Install mdJSONdictio from GitHub
    devtools::install_github("hdvincelette/mdJSONdictio", ref = 'master')

For more detailed instructions and troubleshooting tips, see [Install
mdJSONdictio R
package](https://hdvincelette.github.io/mdJSONdictio/articles/03_Setup_mdJSONdictio.html#install-mdjsondictio-r-package).

## Usage

[`build.mdJSON()`](https://hdvincelette.github.io/mdJSONdictio/reference/build.mdJSON.md)
builds an mdJSON data dictionary that can be imported to mdEditor to
create a Dictionary record. The input file must be formatted to a
[tabular data dictionary
template](https://github.com/hdvincelette/mdJSONdictio/blob/master/inst/templates/mdJSONdictio_Dictionary_Template_v2.xlsx?raw=true).
[`build.table()`](https://hdvincelette.github.io/mdJSONdictio/reference/build.table.md)
builds a tabular data dictionary from an mdEditor mdJSON data
dictionary. Additional functions include
[`validate.mdJSON()`](https://hdvincelette.github.io/mdJSONdictio/reference/validate.mdJSON.md)/[`validate.table()`](https://hdvincelette.github.io/mdJSONdictio/reference/validate.table.md),
which validates mdJSON and tabular data dictionaries against a dataset,
and `modify.mdJSON()`/`modify.table()`, which modifies mdJSON and
tabular data dictionaries based on
inputs.[`extract.mdJSON()`](https://hdvincelette.github.io/mdJSONdictio/reference/extract.mdJSON.md)
extracts one or more mdJSON data dictionary from an mdJSON file
comprised of other types of records.

## Getting help

Submit a [GitHub
Issue](https://github.com/hdvincelette/mdJSONdictio/issues) to report a
bug and request a feature or enhancement. Contact the [project
maintainer](https://github.com/vincelette-usfws) for information about
contributing to this project.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`build.mdJSON()`](https://hdvincelette.github.io/mdJSONdictio/reference/build.mdJSON.md)
  : Build mdJSON Data Dictionaries
- [`build.table()`](https://hdvincelette.github.io/mdJSONdictio/reference/build.table.md)
  : Build Tabular Data Dictionaries
- [`extract.mdJSON()`](https://hdvincelette.github.io/mdJSONdictio/reference/extract.mdJSON.md)
  : Extract mdJSON Data Dictionaries from a Metadata file
- [`validate.mdJSON()`](https://hdvincelette.github.io/mdJSONdictio/reference/validate.mdJSON.md)
  : Validate mdJSON Data Dictionaries
- [`validate.table()`](https://hdvincelette.github.io/mdJSONdictio/reference/validate.table.md)
  : Validate Tabular Data Dictionaries
